name: engineering-assembly
description: Directory of popular Claude Code extensions including development and productivity tools.

plugins.name: development-task-implementation
plugins.description: A structured validate → plan → implement workflow for software development tasks. Validates requirement completeness, decomposes into dependency-aware task lists, and coordinates implementation via subagents with frequent commits. Supports inline text and remote URLs (JIRA, GitHub, Linear).

plugins.name: worktree-setup
plugins.description: Packages a WorktreeCreate hook so `claude --worktree <name>` creates a branch, places the worktree under .worktrees/<name>, and initializes submodules — no per-repo setup.

plugins.name: context7
plugins.description: Bundles the Context7 MCP server (https://mcp.context7.com/mcp) so Claude Code can pull up-to-date, version-specific library documentation and code examples on demand.

plugins.name: atlassian
plugins.description: Bundles the Atlassian Remote MCP Server (Rovo) so Claude Code can access Jira, Confluence, Jira Service Management, Bitbucket, and Compass via OAuth 2.1 SSO login.
